items.docs: Sends a transactional WhatsApp message to a recipient using an approved template or plain text content. Messages are delivered through the WhatsApp Business platform and support dynamic parameter substitution in templates.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of results to return per request.

params.name: offset
params.description: Number of results to skip for pagination.

params.name: startDate
params.description: Filter campaigns created on or after this date.

params.name: endDate
params.description: Filter campaigns created on or before this date.

items.docs: Retrieves a paginated list of all WhatsApp campaigns created in the account. Supports filtering by status and date range.

info.name: Create and send a WhatsApp campaign

items.docs: Creates a new WhatsApp marketing campaign with the specified template, recipients, and scheduling options.

params.name: campaignId
params.description: Unique identifier of the WhatsApp campaign.

items.docs: Retrieves the details of a specific WhatsApp campaign including template, recipients, and delivery statistics.

params.name: campaignId
params.description: Unique identifier of the WhatsApp campaign.

items.docs: Updates an existing WhatsApp campaign with new template, recipients, or scheduling options. Only draft campaigns can be updated.

params.name: campaignId
params.description: Unique identifier of the WhatsApp campaign.

items.docs: Permanently deletes a WhatsApp campaign by its unique identifier.
Creates a new WhatsApp message template. Templates must be approved by Meta before they can be used for sending messages.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of results to return per request.

params.name: offset
params.description: Number of results to skip for pagination.

items.docs: Retrieves all WhatsApp message templates created in the account including their approval status and content.

info.name: Send a WhatsApp template for approval

params.name: templateId
params.description: Unique identifier of the template to submit for approval.

items.docs: Submits a WhatsApp message template to Meta for review and approval. Templates must be approved before they can be used for sending messages to recipients.
